items.title: Super El Niño and AI power demand boost fuel cells
items.summary: The rising chance of a 2026 super El Niño, combined with surging power demand from AI data centers, is intensifying pressure on power systems and the grid. Bloom Energy said in a new report that on-site power generation is the answer for meeting data center electricity needs, and suppliers such as Kaori and Acbel Polytech are also upbeat on fuel-cell demand.

items.title: JEDEC approves SPHBM4 standard to broaden HBM4 packaging and boost glass substrate prospects
items.summary: JEDEC finalized a new HBM4 packaging specification called SPHBM4 that aims to broaden high bandwidth memory (HBM) use cases by reducing packaging complexity and cost, industry sources reported. According to ET News, the DRAM subcommittee completed its review, and the JEDEC board gave final approval, positioning the standard to influence AI semiconductor cost structures and substrate choices.

items.title: 台積電漲價！範圍將涵蓋所有先進製程，漲價原因則是因為這個
items.summary: 全球晶圓代工龍頭台積電傳出將對所有先進製程全面調漲代工價格。這波漲價的影響範圍不僅涵蓋7奈米及以下的所有製程節 […]

items.title: 電子設計迎接新典範 Graser TECHTALKS探索AI串聯全流程
items.summary: 今日的電子設計正走向跨IC、封裝、PCB、系統、資料中心與實體應用的全流程協同，而快速演進的人工智慧（AI）在其中扮演關鍵角色。由映陽科技（Graser）於6月上旬主辦的年度技術論壇2026 Graser

items.title: 陽明交大引進AMD平台 升級校園先進製程IC設計教學環境
items.summary: 半導體製程持續推進，先進製程之積體電路（IC）設計與所使用的EDA（Electronic Design Automation；電子設計自動化）的運算與模擬需求也隨之快速攀升。然而過去台灣各大學的IC設計教學環境，長期停留在0.18

items.title: AI算力競賽引爆光通訊革命  蔡司、康寧解析AI資料中心技術
items.summary: 生成式AI快速發展帶動全球對算力需求呈現指數型成長，AI資料中心正面臨前所未有的頻寬、功耗與散熱挑戰，尤其負責資料傳輸的光通訊技術，如矽光子（Silicon Photonics）與共封裝光學（Co-Packaged Optics；

items.title: 台積電資本布局策略受矚　傳聯發科擬結盟創意再拚ASIC
items.summary: 雲端服務供應商（CSP）加速投入自研晶片，特用晶片（ASIC）快速崛起，半導體產業鏈也出現新的合作想像。市場盛傳，聯發科正評估透過「投資入股」或「策略聯盟」等方式，與台積電旗下IC設計服務廠創意深化合作

items.title: 傳SK海力士放緩HBM4擴產　轉攻高獲利「通用DRAM」
items.summary: 有消息稱，SK海力士（SK Hynix）正放緩第六代高頻寬記憶體（HBM4）的量產擴張速度，並將重心轉向通用DRAM市場。據韓媒Chosun Biz引述業界消息，SK海力士近期傳出，延後部分原定由HBM3E升級至HBM4

items.title: 小天才為何能擊退三星　躍居全球第4大智慧手錶品牌？
items.summary: 觀察2026年第1季全球智慧手錶銷售表現，imoo擊退三星電子（Samsung Electronics）、Oppo、Garmin等業者，成為全球第4大智慧手錶品牌廠。事實上，近年imoo全球智慧手錶出貨已與三星電子旗鼓相當。依

items.title: 【漫圖秒懂】美伊戰火掏空庫存　半導體材料商醞釀漲價回收成本
items.summary: 美伊戰爭打了106天，南韓半導體材料商庫存幾近見底。與此同時，三星電子（Samsung Electronics）、SK海力士（SK Hynix）同時大幅增產AI記憶體，供需壓力雪上加霜。如今戰爭落幕，材料商儲將開始展開庫存重

items.title: Efinix攻邊緣AI　評估導入台積電日本產能

items.title: 傳三星電機供貨高通AI200 ABF載板　從手機切入AI資料中心供應鏈
items.summary: 有消息稱，三星電機（Semco）已開始量產供應給高通（Qualcomm）資料中心用AI加速器的封裝基板。業界認為，此次供貨象徵雙方過去以行動裝置與PC半導體為主的合作關係，正逐步擴展至AI資料中心領域。據韓媒

items.title: NVIDIA推進歐洲35座AI超級電腦　總算力最高達800 Exaflops
items.summary: NVIDIA於ISC 2026宣布，將與合作夥伴於歐洲23個國家部署35座全新超級電腦與AI工廠，合計最高可達800 Exaflops算力，目標是加速超過300萬名研究人員的科學與產業應用。這波布局涵蓋西班牙、德國、義大利

items.title: 現代汽車集團傳再挖角Tesla、NVIDIA人才　全面加速SDV布局
items.summary: 正推動組織重整的現代汽車集團（Hyundai Motor Group），傳近期接連延攬來自Tesla與NVIDIA等企業的核心人才，以強化未來汽車與機器人領域的競爭力。據韓媒每日經濟引述業界消息，現代汽車集團正針對作為未來

items.title: 三星Exynos 2700擴大反攻　傳瞄準Galaxy最高階機型
items.summary: 三星電子（Samsung Electronics）系統LSI事業部正加大自研應用處理器（AP）Exynos的內部推廣力道，目標是讓下一代Exynos 2700，不只搭載於Galaxy S系列標準版與Plus機型，而是更進一步打入Galaxy S

items.title: 阿布達比AI基金MGX有意收購新加坡DayOne 　擴大資料中心布局
items.summary: 阿布達比人工智慧（AI）基金MGX傳有意收購新加坡資料中心營運業者DayOne。據路透（Reuters）報導，知情人士指出，MGX正與一家投行合作，為潛在的交易做準備。然而，由於DayOne正在準備美國IPO，估值為

items.title: 【Amy & Dr. Chip】2030無人工廠目標　三星偷偷完成第一步
items.summary: 三星電子（Samsung Electronics）正加速推進AI驅動的無人化Fab藍圖。韓媒消息指出，三星已建立名為DSEP（Data Sharing Eco Platform）的資料共享平台，目前已有超過60家半導體設備、材料與零組件供應商

items.title: Elon Musk推1GW太空資料中心　SpaceX傳洽三星開發太空記憶體
items.summary: 消息傳出，由於美國太空企業SpaceX提出合作洽談，三星電子（Samsung Electronics）正在評估開發可於太空環境中使用的記憶體晶片。據韓媒inews24引述業界消息，SpaceX近日已就太空用記憶體晶片的合作可能性

items.title: 【Amy & Dr. Chip】不是破冰那麼簡單　三星與京東方面板再速配！
items.summary: 三星電子（Samsung Electronics）與京東方的關係再度升溫，表面上看是高層互訪，實際上卻可能牽動手機與電視面板供應鏈的新布局。隨著零組件成本上升、手機市場成長放緩，三星終端事業不得不重新計算成本、品

items.title: HBM持續短缺　SanDisk押注HBF單晶片整合NAND與運算
items.summary: AI快速崛起及相應運算需求成長，導致現存技術的瓶頸問題逐漸浮現。為克服記憶體限制，美系NANDFlash大廠SanDisk試圖透過在晶片內堆疊NAND快閃記憶體等創新技術，推出解決方案。Wccftech報導，目前DRAM

items.title: 【動物農莊】鴿們聊ASML固樁！　南韓突然變第一大金主
items.summary: 半導體設備龍頭ASML加速強化與南韓客戶的合作關係。據韓媒報導，ASML Korea正招募專門服務SK海力士（SK Hynix）的客戶技術經理，負責協助規劃EUV與DUV設備導入策略。市場認為，隨著高頻寬記憶體

items.title: 【動物農莊】HBM熱到封裝塞車　三星、SK海力士為何鎖定湖南圈？
items.summary: 人工智慧（AI）伺服器需求急速升溫，帶動高頻寬記憶體（HBM）與先進封裝產能同步吃緊，也讓南韓半導體大廠，開始重新思考新廠選址。過去投資多集中在首都圈與忠清圈，如今在土地、電力、用水與人才壓力升高下

items.title: 科技1分鐘：為AI資料中心而生——超高密度可插拔光學（XPO）
items.summary: AI推動資料中心規模快速擴張，數十萬顆GPU組成的運算叢集正帶來前所未有的頻寬需求。如何在有限空間內傳輸更多資料、降低建置成本，同時兼顧散熱與維護效率，已成為產業關注焦點。近期由Arista Networks主導

items.title: 前中芯CEO邱慈雲再下一城　繼12吋矽晶圓後再攻光罩
items.summary: 前中芯國際執行長邱慈雲，近年逐步將重心從晶圓代工轉向半導體上游材料領域。繼主導中國12吋矽晶圓龍頭滬硅產業集團及上海新昇發展後，由其擔任董事長的廣州新銳光掩模科技近日也啟動IPO上市輔導，為這位半導體

items.title: 上海啟用海底AI資料中心　離岸風電驅動開啟綠色算力新途徑
items.summary: 隨著人工智慧（AI）資料中心耗電與散熱壓力快速攀升，中國在上海臨港新片區外海正式啟用一座由離岸風力發電驅動的海底資料中心，成為全球少數進入商業化營運階段的海底算力設施。綜合Tom’s Hardware

items.title: 79%資料中心容量面臨極端氣候風險　亞太曝險比例最高
items.summary: 氣候風險分析公司First Street於6月19日發布報告指出，全球97個資料中心市場中，79%的容量面臨洪水、極端風力和野火等急性氣候事件的威脅，可能中斷營運、增加停機時間並推高保險和維修成本；另有超過一半的資

items.title: SK Siltron新廠7月啟動　12吋晶圓產能估擴增5成
items.summary: SK集團（SK Group）的矽晶圓生產關係企業SK Siltron即將啟動矽晶圓新廠。外界預期，隨著AI資料中心投資持續擴大，半導體需求回升，SK Siltron業績將隨之改善。據韓媒Theelec引述業界消息，SK Siltron將

items.title: Chips&Media Signs Next-Gen ‘AV2’ Video IP Licensing Deal with North American Big Tech, Strengthening Global Standards Leadership
items.summary: Chips&Media, a leading provider of video intellectual property (IP) solutions, has announced a strategic licensing agreement with a major North American technology company for its next-generation AV2 video codec IP. The agreement marks a significant milestone for the company as demand accelerates for advanced video…

items.summary: 隨著人工智慧（AI）基礎設施快速發展，資料中心龐大的水電消耗引發外界高度關注。為因應此危機，輝達（Nvidia […]

items.title: Nvidia targets robot safety as humanoids edge toward factory floors
items.summary: Getting humanoid robots into factories and warehouses has always depended on two things: making them smart enough to be useful and safe enough to work alongside people.

items.title: 台積電加速布局 CoPoS，FOPLP、玻璃基板市場規模 2030 年上看 81 億美元

items.title: AI 傳輸需求升溫，矽格下半年再添 ASIC、光通訊新客戶
items.summary: IC 封測廠矽格總經理葉燦鍊表示，AI 產業發展已從算力延伸至高頻寬記憶體與高速傳輸，帶動 AI、ASIC、光 […]

items.title: AI data center buildout fuels optical interconnect race, but 6-inch InP wafers hit supply wall
items.summary: Technology giants are continuing to expand AI computing infrastructure, driving demand for high-performance optical interconnect components. US optical communications leaders Coherent and Lumentum are actively developing 6-inch indium phosphide (InP) wafer production technology. Industry sources said 4-inch wafers remain the mainstream format, but fast-growing demand in optical communications is accelerating the shift toward 6-inch substrates. Supply constraints, however, persist,

items.title: Nippon Sanso raises helium prices over 30% on Middle East instability-driven supply crunch
items.summary: Industrial gas manufacturer Nippon Sanso Holdings announced it will raise prices for all helium products in the Japanese market starting in July 2026, with an average price increase of more than 30%. Affected products include helium used in key applications such as semiconductor front-end process wafer cooling and medical magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) equipment. The move is mainly driven by geopolitical instability in the Middle East.

items.title: AI 狂潮催生新貴階級！三星、SK 海力士員工變績優股，晉升婚友市場「A+ 級搶手貨」
items.summary: 全球 AI 熱潮促使韓國兩大記憶體巨頭 SK 海力士和三星電子成為資本市場寵兒，其員工亦躍升為韓國婚戀市場最受 […]

items.title: 輝達 B200 租賃報價回落  Kalshi 交易員：難回前高
items.summary: 輝達（Nvidia）股價近來陷入盤整，而隨著其頂尖 AI 晶片的算力租賃價格回落，Kalshi 預測平台交易員 […]

items.title: Huawei renews Wi-Fi 6 patent push, putting networking equipment makers on alert
items.summary: Huawei has continued to pursue patent litigation against networking equipment makers in Europe in recent years, with its latest case targeting a Taiwanese vendor. Sercomm recently disclosed that its German subsidiary, Sercomm Deutschland GmbH, had received a lawsuit from Huawei over certain Wi-Fi 6 products sold in Germany and other markets.

items.title: Fulltech sees low DK2 shipments rising, starts M9 quartz cloth certification
items.summary: Fulltech, a glass fiber yarn and cloth maker, said at its 2026 annual general meeting that demand for next-generation AI servers and high-speed switches is lifting specifications and demand for upstream PCB materials. Chairman Yuan-Pin Chang said the share of low DK2 shipments will keep rising in the second half of 2026, helping optimize the product mix and boost revenue and profitability.

items.title: NYCU, Phison join forces to build AI heterogeneous computing resource management platform
items.summary: Taiwan's National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University (NYCU) and Phison Electronics are teaming up to build a GPU resource management platform to improve the efficiency of computing resource utilization on campus.

items.title: WeMo bets on asset-light, open-platform model to scale Taiwan's MaaS ecosystem and drive growth for the next decade
items.summary: Approaching its 10th anniversary, Taiwan-based shared mobility company WeMo Scooter is doubling down on an open-platform strategy to cement its position in the Mobility-as-a-Service (MaaS) market. Powering nearly 10 million rides annually, the company is expanding its cross-platform ecosystem and partnership network to capture new users while avoiding the capital-intensive path of vehicle manufacturing.

items.title: Kaori's Kaohsiung plant targets 2027 output for AI cooling and green energy demand
items.summary: Kaori Heat Treatment held a groundbreaking ceremony for its new plant at Kaohsiung's Ciaotou Science Park on June 23. Chairman Dr. Allen Wu led the management team at the event, joined by government representatives and industry partners. Total investment in the Ciaotou Science Park plant is expected to be capped at NT$3.25 billion (approx. US$103 million), making it Kaori's largest production base, with a development scale exceeding the combined size of its existing sites.

items.title: South Korea takes physical AI push from policy to practice
items.summary: South Korea has moved its Physical AI Alliance from a policy-setting body into an operational platform, as the government and companies such as Naver deepen cooperation with Nvidia on physical AI, AI factories and large-scale computing infrastructure.

items.title: Microsoft's Satya Nadella warns against AI profits being absorbed by just a few companies
items.summary: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella warned against allowing only a handful of companies to economically profit from the new AI era. In an interview with Bloomberg, he critiqued the current trajectory of the AI race while predicting that the next phase of the industry would rely more on cheaper models.

items.title: Intel deepens ties with Taiwan's chip supply chain as October talks expand
items.summary: Intel is deepening cooperation with Taiwan's semiconductor supply chain and plans to broaden its engagement again in mid-October after completing exchanges in the US with several Taiwanese suppliers in the first quarter of 2026.

items.title: Samsung Electro-Mechanics rides Qualcomm's data center push into servers
items.summary: Samsung Electro-Mechanics has begun mass production of advanced package substrates for Qualcomm's first data center AI accelerator, extending the companies' supply relationship from mobile and PC chips into server-class semiconductors, ZDNet Korea reported.

items.title: YMTC Holdings exits XMC as state-backed Optics Valley investor takes control
items.summary: China's memory industry is undergoing another round of ownership restructuring. According to a recent merger review case disclosed by China's State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR), YMTC Holdings, the parent company of Yangtze Memory Technologies (YMTC), will sell its 39% stake in Wuhan Xinxin Semiconductor Manufacturing (XMC) to Wuhan Optics Valley Semiconductor Industry Investment.

items.title: Micron and Anthropic partner to advance next-gen AI infrastructure
items.summary: Micron and Anthropic have announced a strategic agreement to scale the infrastructure needed to support increasingly powerful AI models, deepening ties between a leading memory supplier and one of the industry's fastest-growing AI developers.

items.title: SK Hynix Cheongju plant accidents raise HBM expansion safety concerns
items.summary: SK Hynix's semiconductor production base in Cheongju, South Korea, has seen a string of accidents since 2026, prompting questions over whether its safety management system has gaps. The incidents have drawn scrutiny because many occurred after the M15X fab began operation, as the company ramped up production to meet surging high-bandwidth memory (HBM) demand.

items.title: Available Is Not In Control: Balancing Output, Quality, and Risk in High-Volume Fabs
items.summary: A deposition chamber drops out of production at 2 a.m. Forty minutes later it is back, the dashboard flips from red to green, and two people want opposite things. The operations-center operator has a step starving downstream and wants the tool dispatched now. The module’s shift group leader wants test wafers run and confirmed…
